basic_details.job_title: DSSSB – Assistant, Trained Graduate Teacher and More – 1979 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Forensic Science Laboratory | Directorate of Education | New Delhi Municipal Council (NDMC) | Information Technology Department | Department of Delhi Archives | Labour Department
basic_details.post_name: Assistant, Trained Graduate Teacher and More – 1979 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board has published the DSSSB 03/2026 Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 1979 Assistant, Trained Graduate Teacher and More Posts. Apply online by July 15. Salary ₹19,900-1,42,400. Check eligibility, age limit, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.

application_fee.general_fee: ₹100/- (Exempted for Women, SC, ST, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen)

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, BCA, B.Sc, Diploma, ITI, 12TH, 10TH, M.Sc

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the official DSSSB portal at dsssbonline.nic.in. Before applying, candidates must complete a one-time registration on the portal. The same user ID and password can be used for all future DSSSB examinations - no separate registration is required for each post. However, only one online application is allowed per post code; if multiple applications are detected for the same post code, all will be rejected and the candidate may be debarred. Once an application is submitted, no corrections or modifications - including change of category - will be permitted under any circumstances.
seo_tags: DSSSB Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1979 Assistant, Trained Graduate Teacher and More Posts
